title: 组件设计最佳实践
code:
<Tabs defaultValue="profile">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="profile">资料</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">设置</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="profile">
    <Profile />
  </TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="settings">
    <Settings />
  </TabsContent>
</Tabs>
